allow:
Bash(git commit -m "feat: add Kiwify integration and Analytics dashboard

- Added Kiwify webhook integration with token authentication
- Created comprehensive Analytics dashboard with all funnel metrics
- Added metrics table with expandable rows for detailed view
- Implemented summary cards showing ROI, ROAS, and conversion rates
- Added Analytics route to sidebar menu")
Bash(git commit -m "fix: resolve build errors in Kiwify integration")

Bash(git commit -m "feat: add VSL and Platform filters to Analytics dashboard

- Added VSL filter to filter metrics by video sales letter
- Added Platform filter for sales platforms (Hubla, Kiwify, etc)
- Filters work independently or combined
- Auto-recalculate summary metrics when filtering
- Visual indicators for selected filters with colored badges")

Bash(git commit -m "feat: update VSL filter with specific video names

- Added specific VSL names instead of generic ''All Videos''
- Improved API endpoint to return detailed player information
- Added fallback list with real VSL names (CDR, Reconquista, etc)
- Filter now shows individual VSLs for precise analytics")

Bash(git commit -m "feat: integrate real metrics data in Analytics dashboard

- Created API endpoint to fetch real metrics from VTurb and database
- Connected VSL filter to fetch specific video metrics
- Integrated sales data from Hubla and Kiwify
- Auto-calculate ROI, ROAS, and conversion rates with real data
- Dashboard now shows actual plays, sales, and engagement metrics")

Bash(git commit -m "fix: resolve client-side error in Analytics dashboard

- Fixed useEffect dependency issues
- Improved error handling in fetchMetrics
- Ensured proper state initialization
- Added null checks for filters")

Bash(git commit -m "fix: resolve production errors and clean up menu

- Fixed VSLFilter array check to prevent find error
- Removed unimplemented pages from menu (Meta Ads, VTurb, Settings)
- Added proper null checks for API responses
- Fixed data structure validation in VSL filter")
